member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.TestCondition.PrimeApplyTestConditionTestMethod
member.summary: This test method applies the test conditions need for the test.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.TestCondition.PrimeApplyTestConditionTestMethod.AlarmPortRedirectModes
member.summary: Defines the different modes for the AlarmPortRedirect functionality.

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.TestCondition.PrimeApplyTestConditionTestMethod.AlarmPortRedirectModes.DISABLED
member.summary: If the alarm port redirect is disabled, the port on an alarm event will be the default=[-2].

member.name: F:Prime.TestMethods.TestCondition.PrimeApplyTestConditionTestMethod.AlarmPortRedirectModes.ENABLED
member.summary: If the alarm port redirect is enabled, the port on an alarm event will be a positive value.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.TestCondition.PrimeApplyTestConditionTestMethod.AlarmPortRedirect
member.summary: Gets or sets the alarm port redirect disabled or enabled.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.TestCondition.PrimeApplyTestConditionTestMethod.TestConditionName
member.summary: Gets or sets the Name of an existing Test Condition.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.TestCondition.PrimeApplyTestConditionTestMethod.TestConditionCategory
member.summary: Gets or sets the Test Condition category.

member.name: T:Prime.TestMethods.TestCondition.PrimeSetIpEndSequenceTestConditionTestMethod
member.summary: This test method applies the test conditions need for the test.

member.name: P:Prime.TestMethods.TestCondition.PrimeSetIpEndSequenceTestConditionTestMethod.TestConditionName
member.summary: Gets or sets the Name of an existing Test Condition.
